info.name: Taxi Backend — All APIs (Node)
info.description: **Node backend surface area** (JSON): `api/v1` mobile API (mirrors `routes/api/v1/*.php`), CMS under `/api/*-content`, public JSON stubs under `/web/*` from `registerWebRoutes.js`, admin REST + same web-style stubs under `/api/v1/admin/*`. **Not included:** full Laravel `routes/web.php` admin SPA (Inertia/Blade, hundreds of HTML dashboard routes) — those are not ported 1:1 to this API. Regenerate: `npm run postman:collection`. Set `baseUrl` (e.g. https://taxi-a276.onrender.com). Use `token` / `driverToken` / `ownerToken` / `dispatcherToken` / `adminToken` as appropriate.

item.name: 2b. Admin — same paths as /web (JWT adminToken)
item.description: `registerWebRoutes` is mounted on `/api/v1/admin` after auth. Replace `/web` with `/api/v1/admin` and send Bearer adminToken.
